Resources

Documentation, source code, and learning materials to help you get the most out of FreeMoCap.

Documentation

Comprehensive guides covering installation, camera setup, calibration, recording, and data processing. Everything you need to get started and go deeper.

Source Code (GitHub)

Browse the full FreeMoCap codebase, report issues, submit pull requests, and contribute to the project's development.

Installation Guide

Step-by-step instructions for installing FreeMoCap on your system, including prerequisites and troubleshooting tips.

YouTube Channel

Video tutorials, technical demos, dev-streams, and community showcases on the official FreeMoCap YouTube channel.

Discord Community

Get real-time help, share your work, and connect with other FreeMoCap users and developers.

Twitch Dev Streams

Watch live development sessions and Q&A streams where the team builds FreeMoCap in the open.
